Case notes

Where practices lose the most time

Six patterns show up in almost every front office we look at. None of them are staff failures — they're the predictable result of doing repetitive work by hand.

01

Calls go to voicemail

Front desks answer a fraction of incoming calls during peak hours. The rest wait, or hang up and call someone else.

02

Reminders are inconsistent

Manual reminders depend on someone remembering to send them. Empty chairs are the result.

03

Cancellations sit unfilled

A cancelled slot rarely gets rebooked in time — there's no system watching the waitlist in real time.

04

Intake happens in the waiting room

New patients fill out paperwork on arrival, which slows the whole schedule down from the first appointment of the day.

05

Follow-ups fall through

Post-op checks and treatment-plan nudges need someone to remember them — so they often don't happen.

06

Reviews go unasked

Happy patients rarely leave a review unless asked at exactly the right moment.

The system

Four modules, one front office

Each module runs on its own, and they hand off to each other automatically — a missed call becomes a booked slot without anyone touching a keyboard.

I.

AI Receptionist

Answers every call and text, in plain language, 24 hours a day. Books appointments, answers billing questions, and hands off to your team the moment it should.

II.

Reminders & Rebooking

Sends reminders by text, email, and voice on a schedule you set. When a patient cancels, the next waitlisted patient is offered the slot automatically.

III.

Intake & FAQ

New patients complete intake by chat before they arrive. Common questions about insurance, hours, and treatments get answered instantly, any time of day.

IV.

Follow-ups & Reviews

Post-visit check-ins and treatment-plan nudges go out on schedule. Review requests are timed to the moment a patient is most likely to say yes.

Setup

Live in under an hour

1

Connect your practice

Link your practice-management system and phone line. No IT project required.

2

AI learns your protocols

DentistsFlow.ai picks up your scheduling rules, hours, and tone of voice from day one.

3

Your team focuses on care

Calls, reminders, and follow-ups run themselves. Your staff spends the time on patients instead.

What to expect

15 minutes, no pressure

We'll walk through your current front-office workflow and show exactly where DentistsFlow.ai fits — with your own practice as the example.

  • A live walkthrough with your own schedule
  • No credit card, ever
  • HIPAA-compliant by design
  • Set up in under an hour
Before you ask

Questions, answered

Yes. DentistsFlow.ai is built to HIPAA-ready standards, with encrypted storage and access controls on every conversation and record.

Most practices are live within an hour. We connect to your existing phone line and practice-management system — no new hardware.

No. It handles the repetitive volume — calls, reminders, intake — so your team can spend their time on patients in the office, not on hold.

DentistsFlow.ai connects to the major practice-management platforms. If yours isn't listed, tell us during your demo and we'll confirm compatibility.

Pricing depends on your practice size and call volume. We'll give you an exact number during your demo — no obligation either way.
